articles.author: Finya Swai
articles.title: State Department to release limited edition ‘America250’ passports with Trump’s face - Politico
articles.description: The booklet will include an image of the president’s face on the inside cover and other founding-era imagery.
articles.content: The new passports are expected to be released in July as part of the Trump administrations America250 initiative that includes a UFC fight at the White House and a Grand Prix street race in Washingto… [+1274 chars]
